---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve the Flint compiler and runtime.
title: '[BUG] '
labels: 'bug, triage'
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is (e.g., Compiler crash, incorrect C99 generation, or runtime segmentation fault).

## Minimal Reproducible Example
Please provide the smallest Flint script (`.fl`) that triggers the issue:

```flint
# Paste your code here
```

Expected Behavior
What did you if_fail to happen? (e.g., "It should print 'Hello', but it crashed with a segfault in the Arena").

Environment
OS & Architecture: [e.g. Linux x86_64, macOS aarch64]

Flint Version: [e.g. v1.11.0]

Compiler used to build Flint: [e.g. Zig 0.11.0, Clang 16]

Additional Context
Add any other context, compiler tracebacks, or hyperfine benchmarks about the problem here.
